programme.title: The Quick And The Dead
programme.desc: (1963) War drama starring Victor French and Majel Barrett. With the aid of local partisans, a group of American soldiers try to make it through enemy-occupied Italy to safety.

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A passenger faces the prospect of missing his son's operation after missing his flight, and an electrical failure causes a blackout onboard a grounded plane. S1Ep15

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A couple of unusual passengers are causing excitement on a flight to Chicago's Sea World, and a man dressed as a tiger causes intrigue on the ground in Chicago. S1Ep16

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: There is frustration for the Airline staff as passengers turn up late and irate, and a passenger faces an anxious wait as she tries to get to her dying mother in time. S1Ep17

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Mommy's Cheating Scandal
programme.desc: (2021) Thriller based on real-life events, with Karis Cameron. A student gets caught in an admission scandal in a bid to get into a good college. A manhunt for the ring leader has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Amber Alert
programme.desc: A troubled young man hijacks a bus load of school children. Meanwhile Detective Amber Cross (Alaina Huffman), battling with her own demons and issues, is called in to negotiate

programme.title: My Baby Gone
programme.desc: A mother to be realises that the woman who moves in next door is not being truthful, and that once the baby is born it will be in danger. Starring Anna Van Hooft (2017)

programme.title: Killer Night Shift
programme.desc: (2018) Thriller with Ashleigh Dorrell. Amy begins her first night shift at a hotel. But this is a place with a dark past, and sometimes history repeats itself... Will she survive the graveyard shift?

programme.title: My Stepfather's Secret
programme.desc: (2019) Thriller with Vanessa Marcil. A college student returns home to discover her mother has a new fiancé. But as she finds out more about him, should it be alarm bells rather than wedding bells?

programme.title: A Deadly Lullaby
programme.desc: After losing her child, Olivia meets a woman and her daughter.

programme.title: Gone Daughter Gone
programme.desc: (2020) Suspenseful thriller starring Andrea Bogart. When her daughter is abducted, Shannon decides to take matters into her own hands, putting her on a collision course with a deadly kidnapper...

programme.title: Nocebo
programme.desc: (2022) Unsettling psychological thriller starring Eva Green. A fashion designer suffers from a puzzling illness that confounds her doctors - until a mysterious caregiver reveals a horrifying truth...

programme.title: American Siege
programme.desc: (2021) Tense action with Bruce Willis. A troubled sheriff steps in when a group of small-town thugs take a local doctor hostage, demanding the truth behind a teenager's disappearance a decade earlier.

programme.title: Jack Hunter And The Star Of Heaven
programme.desc: (2008) Action starring Ivan Sergei. When archaeologist Jack Hunter's mentor is killed, he must find the culprit and stop ancient treasure falling into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Ride in The Whirlwind
programme.desc: (1966) Western starring Jack Nicholson. Mistaken for outlaws, three cowboys find themselves on the run from a relentless posse hungry for justice.
